channel.title: Delta on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Delta on Arrans github.io

item.title: dlvhdr/diffnav
item.description: A git diff pager based on delta but with a file tree, à la GitHub.

item.title: AppImageCommunity/AppImageUpdate
item.description: AppImageUpdate lets you update AppImages in a decentral way using information embedded in the AppImage itself.
